# La Bella Vista

## About
La Bella Vista offers an exquisite Italian dining experience with breathtaking views of the city. Our chefs use only the finest ingredients to create authentic Italian dishes that will transport you straight to Italy. With over 20 years of culinary excellence, we take pride in delivering memorable dining experiences.
Our restaurant features a sophisticated ambiance perfect for romantic dinners, business meetings, and special celebrations. Our extensive wine list complements our menu perfectly, with selections from both Italian and local vineyards.

#### Free WiFi
Complimentary high-speed internet

#### Valet Parking
Complimentary valet service

#### Outdoor Seating
Beautiful patio with city views

#### Wine Bar
Extensive selection of wines

## Menu Highlights
Explore our signature dishes crafted with passion and the finest ingredients

### Appetizers

#### Bruschetta Classica
Toasted bread topped with tomatoes, garlic, and fresh basil

#### Antipasto Platter
Selection of Italian cured meats, cheeses, and olives

#### Calamari Fritti
Crispy fried squid served with lemon aioli

### Main Courses

#### Spaghetti Carbonara
Classic Roman pasta with eggs, cheese, pancetta, and black pepper

#### Osso Buco
Braised veal shanks with saffron risotto

#### Pollo Parmigiana
Breaded chicken breast with tomato sauce and melted mozzarella

### Desserts

#### Tiramisu
Classic Italian dessert with coffee-soaked ladyfingers

#### Panna Cotta
Vanilla custard with berry compote

        outputs: "invite_link, source_url",
        category: "social"
      },
      {
        name: "Instagram Profile Scraper",
        purpose: "Extract profile and contact details from Instagram.",
        inputs: "Usernames list, headless mode",
        outputs: "username, full_name, bio, emails, phones, links, website, followers, screenshot_path",
        category: "social"
      },

        name: "Telegram Channel Scraper",
        purpose: "Extract channel profile and message-level contacts.",
        inputs: "Channels, scroll count, max messages, headless mode",
        outputs: "description, admin_handles, emails, phones, websites, social_links, message_text",
        category: "social"
      },

        name: "Universal Content Harvester",

        inputs: "Bulk URL list",

        category: "business"
      },

        name: "YouTube Lead Scraper",
        purpose: "Extract lead data from videos and descriptions.",
        inputs: "Search query, max videos",
        outputs: "title, channel, views, url, emails, social_links",
        category: "social"
      },
      {
        name: "Google Play Scraper",
        purpose: "Extract app developer support contact data.",
        inputs: "Search query",
        outputs: "app_name, developer, email, website, app_url",
        category: "ecommerce"
      }

    const toolGrid = document.getElementById("toolGrid");
    const toolSearch = document.getElementById("toolSearch");
    const categoryPills = document.getElementById("categoryPills");
    const yearEl = document.getElementById("year");
    const menuBtn = document.getElementById("menuBtn");
    const mainNav = document.getElementById("mainNav");
    let activeCategory = "all";

    function renderTools() {
      const q = toolSearch.value.trim().toLowerCase();
      const filtered = tools.filter((tool) => {
        const categoryOk = activeCategory === "all" || tool.category === activeCategory;
        const queryOk =
          !q ||
          tool.name.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
          tool.purpose.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
          tool.outputs.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
          tool.inputs.toLowerCase().includes(q);
        return categoryOk && queryOk;
      });

      toolGrid.innerHTML = filtered
        .map((tool) => {
          const outputs = tool.outputs.split(",").map((s) => s.trim());
          return `
            <article class="tool-card reveal visible">
              <h3>${tool.name}</h3>
              <p class="tool-purpose">${tool.purpose}</p>
              <span class="tool-mini">Key Inputs</span>
              <p style="font-size:.86rem; color:#2f5577; margin-bottom:.45rem;">${tool.inputs}</p>
              <span class="tool-mini">Main Output Fields</span>
              <ul>${outputs.map((o) => `<li>${o}</li>`).join("")}</ul>
            </article>
          `;
        })
        .join("");
    }

    toolSearch.addEventListener("input", renderTools);

    categoryPills.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
      const btn = event.target.closest(".pill");
      if (!btn) return;
      activeCategory = btn.dataset.category;
      categoryPills.querySelectorAll(".pill").forEach((pill) => pill.classList.remove("active"));
      btn.classList.add("active");
      renderTools();
    });

    document.querySelectorAll(".faq-q").forEach((button) => {
      button.addEventListener("click", () => {
        button.closest(".faq-item").classList.toggle("open");
      });
    });

    function animateCounters() {
      document.querySelectorAll(".count").forEach((el) => {
        const target = Number(el.dataset.target || 0);
        const start = performance.now();
        const duration = 900;

        function tick(now) {
          const progress = Math.min((now - start) / duration, 1);
          const eased = 1 - Math.pow(1 - progress, 3);
          el.textContent = String(Math.round(target * eased));
          if (progress < 1) requestAnimationFrame(tick);
        }

        requestAnimationFrame(tick);
      });
    }

    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(
      (entries) => {
        entries.forEach((entry) => {
          if (entry.isIntersecting) {
            entry.target.classList.add("visible");
            observer.unobserve(entry.target);
          }
        });
      },
      { threshold: 0.13 }
    );

    document.querySelectorAll(".reveal").forEach((el) => observer.observe(el));

    menuBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
      mainNav.classList.toggle("open");
    });

    mainNav.querySelectorAll("a").forEach((link) => {
      link.addEventListener("click", () => mainNav.classList.remove("open"));
    });

    yearEl.textContent = new Date().getFullYear();
    renderTools();
    animateCounters();
  </script>
</body>
</html>

	<script>
		(function () {
			const trigger = document.querySelector('.wfm-video-trigger');
			if (!trigger) return;
			const video = trigger.querySelector('.wfm-inline-video');
			if (!video) return;

			function playInlineVideo() {
				trigger.classList.add('is-playing');
				video.play().catch(function () {
					video.controls = true;
				});
			}

			trigger.addEventListener('click', function (event) {
				if (event.target === video) return;
				playInlineVideo();
			});

			trigger.addEventListener('keydown', function (event) {
				if (event.key === 'Enter' || event.key === ' ') {
					event.preventDefault();
					playInlineVideo();
				}
			});
		}());
	</script>
